DOLL_ROOM.pages.VISTA_DOLL.description: You pick up an exquisite doll; it seems to whisper. [orange][sine]"Take me, and wealth and fortune shall follow..."[/sine][/orange]
OTHER_DOLL_ROOM.title: Doll Room
OTHER_DOLL_ROOM.pages.INITIAL.descriptio:
You step into a hidden chamber...

It is filled with dolls; one of them catches your eye.
